summary_one_line: Input needs a well-formed GSUBGPOS table (GPOS/GSUB tag, version 0x00010001, valid FeatureVariations offset) so variations_index is found.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally valid GSUB/GPOS table header whose version field equals 0x00010001 (the second AND-clause operand at line 4328) and whose FeatureVariations sub-table offset is non-zero, so the parsed variations_index != NOT_FOUND_INDEX. Winner seeds carry the literal table tag 'GPOS'/'GSUB' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f plus version bytes 00 01 00 01 at offsets 0x00-0x05 and a structured header (ff 1e 21 ... 00 00 00 18 00 01 00 0a) following the tag.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds begin 00 01 00 00 00 01 and carry the ASCII tag 'GPOS' (or 'GSUB') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f, followed by a fixed structured header; the winner takes the true side 35 times (T=35) at the blocker and proceeds into find_substitute at line 4330.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds are short (13-62 bytes) and lack the GPOS/GSUB tag and the version=0x00010001 header — at offsets 0x0c-0x0f the loser bytes are scattered (00/01/2c/2b) not 'GPOS', so variations_index resolves to NOT_FOUND_INDEX and the branch takes false 94 times (T=0 F=94).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile. The CMP comparing variations_index against FeatureVariations::NOT_FOUND_INDEX and the version-int comparison against 0x00010001 are captured in the per-execution CmpLogObserver buffer; I2SRandReplace then substitutes the exact expected operand bytes into the input, manufacturing the version/offset values that value_profile's distance-bucket feedback alone cannot reach in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of a two-clause AND testing a found variations_index and a version >= 0x00010001.
The second AND-clause requires the table version integer to be at least 0x00010001.
value_profile_cmplog is the winner resolving 8/10 and value_profile the loser blocking 10/10 in the single decisive I2S pair.
Winner-resolving seeds carry the ASCII tag GPOS and a version header beginning 00 01 00 00 00 01.
A winner seed also carries the GSUB tag variant of the same header.
Loser-blocking seeds are short and lack the GPOS/GSUB tag header.
At offsets 0x0c-0x0f the winner concentrates on G/P/O/S while the loser bytes are scattered, a likely-informative dataflow signal.
At the blocker line the winner takes true 35 times while the loser never takes true (T=0 F=94).
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile, which has no I2SRandReplace.
value_profile's mutators do not include I2SRandReplace.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: Mutators**: naive's havoc + token stack. No `I2SRandReplace`.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog records a per-execution CMP buffer that captures the compared operands for I2S substitution.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: per-execution CMP buffer (`CmpLogObserver`), and CMP_MAP gradient buckets

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5557 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 3e57401a2eda285a` and observed exactly 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 22 of the 23-level ancestor chain (ancestor e0a5b09f80625fb6), the unwrapped-I2SRandReplace floor signal for vpc under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on version==0x00010001 plus a non-zero FeatureVariations offset where value_profile resolves as often as value_profile_cmplog within the trial budget would refute the I2S-substitution attribution.

weakest_evidence_point: The blocker compares a parsed variations_index against NOT_FOUND_INDEX rather than directly comparing a raw input field, so attributing resolution to I2S substitution of the version/offset bytes rests on the structural-header correlation in the winner seeds, not on a direct operand match in the byte diff.
